articles.title: AMD B650 expansion cards hit retail starting at $199 — add four M.2 PCIe 4.0 slots and 11 USB ports to any PC with a PCIe slot
articles.summary: A couple of new add-in cards exemplify the trend of slapping AMD's Promontory 21 chipset onto a card for extra I/O expansion.
articles.title_zh: AMD B650 擴展卡開始零售，起價 $199 — 為任何配備 PCIe 插槽的 PC 添加四個 M.2 PCIe 4.0 插槽和 11 個 USB 連接埠
articles.summary_zh: 幾款新的附加卡展示了將 AMD Promontory 21 晶片組集成到卡上以實現額外 I/O 擴展的趨勢。

articles.title: Gaming soundbar can be hijacked from over 16 yards away without touch or pairing — the company allegedly refuses to label the blatant security flaw a cybersecurity risk
articles.summary: Security researcher Rasmus Moorats has demonstrated that Creative's Sound Blaster Katana V2X gaming soundbar can be hijacked over Bluetooth from up to 16 yards away.
articles.title_zh: 遊戲音響可在 16 碼外被劫持，無需接觸或配對 — 該公司據稱拒絕將此明顯安全漏洞標記為網路安全風險
articles.summary_zh: 安全研究人員 Rasmus Moorats 展示了 Creative 的 Sound Blaster Katana V2X 遊戲音響可通過藍牙在 16 碼外被劫持。

articles.title: Upgrade your PC with a 2TB PCIe 4.0 SSD, 750W power supply, and 240mm AIO for $300 — hardware bundle saves you nearly $200
articles.summary: Even though power supplies and CPU coolers have remained unaffected by the AI boom, storage costs have skyrocketed, which makes this deal even more lucrative. You're getting a blazing-fast 2TB SSD, a genuinely solid power supply, and a decent AIO that can help you stop worrying about the small things and focus on sourcing cheaper memory and GPUs.
articles.title_zh: 用 $300 升級你的 PC，配備 2TB PCIe 4.0 SSD、750W 電源和 240mm AIO — 硬體套組為你節省近 $200
articles.summary_zh: 儘管電源和 CPU 散熱器未受 AI 熱潮影響，但儲存成本已飆升，使這筆交易更加划算，你可以獲得高速 2TB SSD、質量可靠的電源和實用的 AIO。

articles.title: $6000 semi-truck gaming rig just got a massive upgrade — cabin overhaul includes new racing bucket seat, pedals, and other accessories to level up their truck
articles.summary: The trucker worked with Conspit to install a new seat, pedals, and other parts and accessories to level up their already insane semi-truck sim rig.
articles.title_zh: $6000 半卡車遊戲主機剛剛獲得重大升級 — 駕駛艙改裝包括新的賽車座椅、踏板和其他配件以提升卡車模擬器
articles.summary_zh: 該卡車司機與 Conspit 合作安裝了新座椅、踏板和其他零件配件，以升級他們已經非常出色的半卡車模擬器。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Grit Method’ builds character with 4 daily goals
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . Habit tracking apps are a dime a dozen, but Grit Method sets itself apart by requiring you to be more thoughtful. With your input, the app clearly outlines four clear goals for you to work towards daily, and it’s about more than just being more productive. more…
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用聚焦：'Grit Method' 以 4 個每日目標塑造品格
articles.summary_zh: 歡迎來到獨立應用聚焦。Grit Method 是一款習慣追蹤應用，通過要求更高的承諾標準而脫穎而出。

articles.title: iOS 27 is coming Monday: New features, compatibility, more
articles.summary: We’re just two days away from iOS 27 being announced WWDC, and rumors are waiting a clear picture of what to expect. The update will reportedly bring a focus on stability improvements and bug fixes, with some big new Apple Intelligence features sprinkled in. Here’s everything we know so far about new iOS 27 features, the update’s release date, and more. more…
articles.title_zh: iOS 27 即將上線：新功能、相容性及更多內容
articles.summary_zh: iOS 27 將在 WWDC 宣布，據傳主要聚焦穩定性改進和錯誤修復，並加入新的 Apple Intelligence 功能。

articles.title: Hands-on: BenQ’s new MA270S is a glossy 27-inch 5K display made for Mac
articles.summary: BenQ has been making excellent Mac-friendly monitors for years, and their new MA270S is the creme de la creme of their lineup. It’s a 27-inch 5K monitor, but with a feature that most monitors don’t ship with: a glossy finish. All of Apple’s displays ship with glossy finishes by default, but for one reason or another, matte finishes have dominated the external monitor market – and BenQ is bucking that trend. This makes the MA270S much more at home with the Mac. more…
articles.title_zh: 動手試玩：BenQ 新款 MA270S 是為 Mac 設計的光澤 27 吋 5K 顯示器
articles.summary_zh: BenQ 的 MA270S 是其陣容中的頂級產品，是一款 27 吋 5K 顯示器，具有大多數顯示器不提供的光澤飾面。

articles.title: tvOS 27 is Apple’s chance to finally fix Apple TV gaming, here’s how
articles.summary: Over a decade ago, with the launch of the of the Apple TV HD and the first version of tvOS, Apple set off on a rather unsuccessful journey to turn the Apple TV into a gaming platform. The efforts have largely died off, but I think this year could potentially mark the beginning of a renaissance, if Apple wanted to. Let’s outline it. more…
articles.title_zh: tvOS 27 是 Apple 最終修復 Apple TV 遊戲的機會，以下是方法
articles.summary_zh: Apple TV 多年來的遊戲平台努力未見成效，但 tvOS 27 可能標誌著遊戲業務復興的開始。

articles.title: Galaxy S26 FE leaks in hands-on image with an updated, slightly funky camera bump
articles.summary: Ahead of its launch sometime later this year, Samsung’s Galaxy S26 FE has surfaced online early, showcasing a familiar, but slightly updated design. more…
articles.title_zh: Galaxy S26 FE 洩露：更新的相機凸起設計
articles.summary_zh: 三星 Galaxy S26 FE 提前現身，展示熟悉但略有更新的設計。

articles.title: Gemini overlay rolls out Dynamic Color, integrates ‘Screen content’ [U]
articles.summary: Following the big Neural Expressive redesign at I/O 2026 last month, Google is rolling out some tweaks to the Gemini overlay on Android. more…
articles.title_zh: Gemini 覆蓋層推出動態顏色，整合「螢幕內容」功能
articles.summary_zh: 繼 I/O 2026 的 Neural Expressive 重新設計後，Google 對 Android 上的 Gemini 覆蓋層進行了調整。

articles.title: Viaim RecDots earbuds are the sleekest AI recording tool yet
articles.summary: There are tons of earbuds and a growing number of AI-powered note-taking hardware, but what if they were combined into one neat package? That’s where Viaim and the RecDot earbuds come in. more…
articles.title_zh: Viaim RecDots 耳塞是最時尚的 AI 錄音工具
articles.summary_zh: Viaim RecDots 將耳塞與 AI 驅動的筆記工具結合為一個簡潔的套件。

articles.title: Oppo Pad 5 Matte Display (aka Air5) benchmark scores
articles.summary: The Oppo Pad 5 Matte Display has a 12.1” IPS LCD that is optimized for reading and note-taking. It has 2,800 x 1,980px resolution, runs at 120Hz refresh rate and renders 12-bit colors. As the name suggests, this has a matte display instead of a glossy one. The panel is TÜV Rheinland certified for a 97% cut to reflections and a 70% reduction in harmful blue light. You can check out our unboxing post to learn more about the slate and its key selling points. Here we will focus on performance – how good is that Dimensity 7300 Ultra? Note that we are testing the middle version with 8GB of RAM...
articles.title_zh: Oppo Pad 5 霧面顯示屏（又稱 Air5）基準測試得分
articles.summary_zh: Oppo Pad 5 Matte Display 配備 12.1 吋 IPS LCD，解析度為 2,800 x 1,980px，刷新率 120Hz，具有霧面而非光澤的顯示屏。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: the Xiaomi 17T and 17T Pro are too expensive, but a price cut can fix that
articles.summary: Predictably, the €100 price hike on the Xiaomi 17T series upset many voters in last week’s poll. However, Xiaomi did make some good choices too. The Xiaomi 17T is smaller than its predecessor and its Pro sibling – it has a 6.59” display versus 6.83” on the 15T and 17T Pro. Barely anyone complained about the smaller size, so, well done Xiaomi. The big battery (6,500mAh) inside the phone certainly helps. The capable 50MP 5x/115mm periscope also proved to be a popular change among voters. And while the Dimensity 8500 Ultra can’t fight flagship-grade silicon, it is just the right chipset to...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：小米 17T 和 17T Pro 價格過高，但降價可以解決
articles.summary_zh: 小米 17T 系列的 €100 漲價令許多投票者不滿，但小米在其他方面做出了良好選擇。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch9 and Watch Ultra 2's charging speeds revealed as they get 3C certified
articles.summary: Samsung is expected to unveil its next-gen Galaxy Watches alongside its new folding smartphones, rumored to go official on July 22 at an event in London. Samsung hasn't confirmed how many smartwatches it will unveil, but the charging speeds of two of them have been revealed as they got 3C certified. The two Samsung smartwatches, bearing model code SM-L3550 and SM-L7150, have appeared in the 3C database with support for 10W charging. The SM-L3550 is believed to be the Galaxy Watch9, while the SM-L7150 is likely the Galaxy Watch Ultra 2. The Galaxy Watch8 and Galaxy Watch Ultra had...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy Watch9 和 Watch Ultra 2 的充電速度公開，獲 3C 認證
articles.summary_zh: Samsung 將在 7 月 22 日的倫敦活動中推出新一代 Galaxy Watch，兩款智慧手錶的充電速度已通過 3C 認證。

articles.title: Fastest mobile chipsets ranked: compare smartphone processor performance
articles.summary: The gap between smartphone chips in 2026 is absurd. The fastest chip we’ve tested is roughly 15 times more powerful than the slowest one still found in modern smartphones. And yet both can run essentially the same apps, games and operating systems. Mobile silicon has become wildly diverse. Of course, raw performance isn’t everything. Software optimization, thermal management, storage speed and app behavior all play a huge role in how fast a phone actually feels day to day. But when it comes to demanding workloads, there’s still no substitute for brute computational power. So we decided...
articles.title_zh: 最快行動晶片排名：比較智慧手機處理器性能
articles.summary_zh: 2026 年智慧手機晶片之間的效能差距極大，最快的晶片比最慢的快約 15 倍。

articles.title: Samsung Galaxy A27 surfaces in a new color
articles.summary: Renders of the Samsung Galaxy A27, which leaked last week, showed the smartphone in three colors and corroborated previous design leaks. Now, we are looking at the Galaxy A27 in a new color, which might be called Awesome Mint, as its images were included in a retail listing. You can check them below. The Galaxy A27 is expected to go official in H2 2026, but Samsung hasn't announced the launch date yet. Samsung hasn't divulged any specs or features of the Galaxy A27 either. However, a recent leak claimed the Galaxy A27 would come with the Snapdragon 6 Gen 3 SoC, up to 8GB of RAM, up to...
articles.title_zh: Samsung Galaxy A27 現身新配色
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Galaxy A27 現已曝光新配色，可能名為 Awesome Mint，進一步確認其設計。

articles.title_zh: Halide Mark III

articles.title_zh: 60 Minutes 記者 Lesley Stahl、Bill Whitaker 及其他人將留在節目中

articles.title: Trump Lawyer Argues Trump Can Tear Down Statue of Liberty
articles.title_zh: 特朗普律師辯稱特朗普可以拆除自由女神像

articles.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
articles.summary: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 推出 Lockdown Mode 以防止提示詞注入攻擊竊取敏感數據
articles.summary_zh: 儘管有 Lockdown Mode，ChatGPT 仍可能易受提示詞注入攻擊，但該功能旨在降低敏感數據被分享的可能性。

articles.title: What to expect from WWDC 2026: Siri’s highly anticipated revamp and Apple Intelligence updates
articles.summary: Apple's WWDC nears: Here's what you can look forward to.
articles.title_zh: WWDC 2026 前瞻：Siri 期待已久的改版和 Apple Intelligence 更新
articles.summary_zh: Apple WWDC 即將舉辦，以下是值得期待的新功能。

articles.title: Sriram Krishnan is leaving his role as White House AI advisor
articles.summary: Krishnan is reportedly starting a new institution to continue shaping Trump's AI policy.
articles.title_zh: Sriram Krishnan 辭去白宮 AI 顧問職位
articles.summary_zh: 據報導，Krishnan 正在建立新機構以繼續塑造 Trump 政府的 AI 政策。

articles.title: The Trump administration might take an equity stake in OpenAI
articles.summary: President Donald Trump said he's discussing deals "where the American people can benefit from the success of AI."
articles.title_zh: Trump 政府可能在 OpenAI 中獲得股權
articles.summary_zh: 總統 Donald Trump 表示他正在討論交易，以便「美國人民能從 AI 的成功中受益」。

articles.title: Five labs, five minds: building a multi-model finance drama on small models
articles.title_zh: 五間實驗室、五位專家：在小型模型上打造多模型金融劇本

articles.title: Venture Capital Trends to Watch in Africa
articles.summary: As funding conditions tighten, investment into African startups held up in 2025. Bloomberg's Jennifer Zabasajja spoke with venture capital investor Tokunboh Ishmael from Alitheia Capital for a view from investors on the ground. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 非洲風險投資趨勢觀察
articles.summary_zh: 儘管融資條件收緊，2025年流向非洲初創企業的投資仍保持穩定。Bloomberg 記者 Jennifer Zabasajja 與 Alitheia Capital 的風險投資家 Tokunboh Ishmael 討論了投資者在當地的看法。

articles.title: Trump AI Policy Adviser Krishnan Is Giving Up White House Role
articles.summary: Sriram Krishnan, a top White House adviser on artificial intelligence, is stepping down from the post.
articles.title_zh: 特朗普 AI 政策顧問 Krishnan 放棄白宮職位
articles.summary_zh: 白宮人工智能首席顧問 Sriram Krishnan 正式離職。

articles.title: Scientists ejected from diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints
articles.summary: Five leading scientists were ousted from the annual meeting of the American Diabetes Association (ADA) in New Orleans on Friday. Their crime: handing out copies of an editorial, published in the journal Diabetes Care on April 29, sharply criticizing the Trump administration's ongoing attacks on scientific research. Those ousted were Steven Kahn, professor of medicine at the University of Washington and editor-in-chief of Diabetes Care, who co-authored the published editorial; former ADA president Desmond Schatz of the University of Florida, Gainesville; Aaron Kelly, pediatrics processor at the University of Minnesota; Justin Ryder of Northwestern University; and Irl Hirsch, also of the University of Washington. The five were handing out reprints of the editorial outside a room where NIH di
articles.title_zh: 科學家因發放期刊文章副本遭逐出糖尿病會議
articles.summary_zh: 五位傑出科學家於週五在紐奧良美國糖尿病協會 (ADA) 年會上被驅逐，原因是他們散發了《Diabetes Care》期刊4月29日發表的社論副本，該社論嚴厲批評特朗普政府對科學的持續攻擊。

articles.title: Anycubic Photon Mono 4 dips below $190 saving you 21% off its retail price — Amazon deal saves $50 on this entry-level resin 3D printer
articles.summary: The Anycubic Photon Mono 4 is on-sale at $189.99, giving you a $50 discount and saving you 21% off its retail price.
articles.title_zh: Anycubic Photon Mono 4 降至 $190 以下，讓您享受 21% 折扣 — Amazon 優惠在這台入門級樹脂 3D 列印機上省下 $50
articles.summary_zh: Anycubic Photon Mono 4 以 $189.99 的價格出售，提供 $50 折扣，相比零售價便宜 21%。

articles.title: MSI, Gigabyte debut new 5K 27-inch Mini-LED monitors with 2,304 dimming zones and glossy panel — both models double the native 180 Hz refresh rate to 330 Hz at 1440p
articles.summary: New Mini-LED monitors from MSI and Gigabyte featuring 5K panels with 2,304 dimming zones and glossy coatings have just been announced. These feature dual- and even triple-mode support, along with full-fat DP 2.1 80 Gbps ports and high peak brightness numbers for HDR. They're also color-accurate enough for professional work.
articles.title_zh: MSI 和 Gigabyte 推出新款 5K 27 英寸 Mini-LED 螢幕，擁有 2,304 個調光區域和光澤面板 — 兩款型號在 1440p 下將原生 180 Hz 刷新率翻倍至 330 Hz
articles.summary_zh: MSI 和 Gigabyte 發佈新款 Mini-LED 螢幕，配備 5K 面板、2,304 個調光區域和光澤涂層，支持雙模和三模，搭載 DP 2.1 80 Gbps 連接埠和高峰值 HDR 亮度。

articles.title: Ukraine’s birds adapt to battlefield environment, weaving optical fiber nests for warmth — canny feathered friends repurpose scraps of this spun off insulator material
articles.summary: Birds in Donbas have been discovered feathering their nests with optical fiber.
articles.title_zh: 烏克蘭鳥類適應戰場環境，編織光纖巢穴取暖 — 聰慧的羽毛朋友重新利用這種絕緣材料的廢料
articles.summary_zh: 頓巴斯地區的鳥類被發現用光纖作為築巢材料。

articles.title: AMD's RDNA 5 gaming GPUs are coming late next year, according to AIBs at Computex — manufacturers expect new Team Red cards in the second half of 2027 alongside Nvidia
articles.summary: AIB partners for AMD at the Computex 2026 show floor have said they expect next-gen RDNA 5 gaming GPUs to land sometime in the second half of 2027, or maybe even in early 2028. That launch schedule lines up closely with Nvidia's RTX 60 series, which is also expected in late 2027 based on current rumors.
articles.title_zh: 據 Computex 參展商表示，AMD 的 RDNA 5 遊戲 GPU 將於明年晚些時候推出 — 製造商預計新款 Team Red 顯卡將在 2027 年下半年推出
articles.summary_zh: AMD 在 Computex 2026 展會上的 AIB 合作夥伴表示，下一代 RDNA 5 遊戲 GPU 預計將在 2027 年下半年或 2028 年初推出，與 Nvidia RTX 60 系列上市時間相近。

articles.title: ASML becomes Europe's most valuable company ever as analysts bet on higher EUV output — its market cap hit $674 billion this week
articles.summary: ASML closed Wednesday, June 3rd, as the most valuable company in European history, reaching a market cap of $668 billion.
articles.title_zh: ASML 成為歐洲歷史上最有價值的公司，分析師看好 EUV 產量增長 — 本週市值達到 $674 億
articles.summary_zh: ASML 在 6 月 3 日星期三收盤時成為歐洲歷史上最具價值的公司，市值達到 $668 億。

articles.title: Google signs $920M monthly compute deal with SpaceX — company’s projected annual data center revenue to exceed its combined proceeds from Starlink, launch services, and AI in 2025
articles.summary: Google's $920-million-a-month deal with SpaceX will let it secure 110,000 Nvidia GPUs starting October 2026. This is the second data center deal that SpaceX has secured in a matter of weeks, especially as it's quickly approaching its IPO on June 12, 2026.
articles.title_zh: Google 與 SpaceX 簽訂月度 $920M 計算交易 — 公司預計 2025 年年度數據中心收入將超過 Starlink、發射服務和 AI 的合計收益
articles.summary_zh: Google 與 SpaceX 簽署的月度 $920 百萬交易將使其從 2026 年 10 月起獲得 110,000 個 Nvidia GPU，這是 SpaceX 數週內獲得的第二份數據中心交易。

articles.title: RetroPad is a ‘full-feature-parity version of Notepad from XP’ in just 2,749 bytes — x86 assembly coded apps comes from Windows legend Dave W Plummer
articles.summary: A 'full-feature-parity version of Notepad' has been written in x86 assembly and it weighs in at under 3KB.
articles.title_zh: RetroPad 是一個 'Windows XP 記事本的完整功能對等版本'，僅需 2,749 個位元組 — x86 組合語言編寫的應用程式來自 Windows 傳奇人物 Dave W Plummer
articles.summary_zh: 一個 '記事本的完整功能對等版本' 以 x86 組合語言編寫，大小不到 3KB。

articles.title: Russia’s new ‘Starlink‑Style’ Rassvet fleet loses its first satellite after weeks — Object 4 drops out of orbit but 15 others remain
articles.summary: Object 4, one of 16 satellites in the first operational batch of Russia's Rassvet broadband network, re-entered Earth's atmosphere on approximately June 6th.
articles.title_zh: 俄羅斯新款 '星鏈風格' Rassvet 衛星群在數週後失去首顆衛星 — Object 4 脫離軌道，但其他 15 顆衛星保持完好
articles.summary_zh: 俄羅斯 Rassvet 寬頻網路首批 16 顆衛星中的 Object 4 號衛星於 6 月 6 日左右重新進入地球大氣層。

articles.title: Developer gets Half-Life running at 30 FPS on a Nokia N95 — proves 2007 phones can just about match 1998 PCs
articles.summary: Argentine developer Dante Leoncini has gotten the original Half-Life running at 30 FPS on a Nokia N95, the Symbian slider phone that launched in 2007.
articles.title_zh: 開發者在 Nokia N95 上以 30 FPS 運行 Half-Life — 證明 2007 年手機幾乎可以匹配 1998 年的 PC
articles.summary_zh: 阿根廷開發者 Dante Leoncini 成功在 2007 年推出的 Symbian 滑蓋手機 Nokia N95 上以 30 FPS 運行原始版 Half-Life。

articles.title: Elegoo Jupiter 2 Resin 3D Printer review: The giant returns for round two
articles.summary: Elegoo’s Jupiter 2 is a resin powerhouse with a large print area and 16K high-quality 3D printing at a reasonable price.
articles.title_zh: Elegoo Jupiter 2 樹脂 3D 列印機評測：巨人的第二輪回歸
articles.summary_zh: Elegoo Jupiter 2 是一台擁有大型列印面積和 16K 高品質 3D 列印功能的樹脂動力機，價格合理。

articles.title: AMD reaches almost 45% CPU share in the latest Steam Hardware Survey for Windows gaming PCs — Ryzen is steadily gaining ground against Intel's legacy domination
articles.summary: The latest Steam Hardware Survey is out and it's showing positive signs of growth for AMD, while Intel is unfortunately on a decline. The Red Team posted its best-ever CPU market share numbers in May 2026 with 45% of all CPUs on Windows being from AMD, while Intel is down to 55%, which is still more for now.
articles.title_zh: AMD 在最新 Steam 硬體調查中的 Windows 遊戲 PC CPU 份額接近 45% — Ryzen 正穩步蠶食 Intel 的傳統優勢
articles.summary_zh: 最新 Steam 硬體調查顯示 AMD 增長積極，Intel 則不幸下滑。Team Red 在 2026 年 5 月創下最佳 CPU 市場份額紀錄，Windows 上 45% 的 CPU 來自 AMD，而 Intel 降至 55%。

articles.title: Ludicrous overclock slams 1.7 volts into 6700K in an attempt to stop CPU from bottlenecking an RTX 3080 — 5.2 GHz on aging four-core pushes GPU utilization from 60% to 74%
articles.summary: YouTuber challenges himself to alleviate a CPU bottleneck with a Core i7-6700K paired with an RTX 3080 through overclocking.
articles.title_zh: 荒謬的超頻在 6700K 上灌入 1.7 伏特，試圖防止 CPU 成為 RTX 3080 的瓶頸 — 老舊四核心在 5.2 GHz 下將 GPU 利用率從 60% 提升至 74%
articles.summary_zh: YouTuber 透過超頻配對 RTX 3080 的 Core i7-6700K，嘗試緩解 CPU 瓶頸。

articles.title: Intel adds iGPU-less mobile chips to Core 200H lineup — Raptor Lake-based Core 7 230H and Core 5 205H sport disabled graphics for small form factor desktop boards
articles.summary: Intel introduces two new Raptor Lake CPUs in its Core 200H series lineup featuring disabled integrated graphics chips. The new CPUs are likely geared towards SFF desktops rather than laptops and 2-in-1 devices.
articles.title_zh: Intel 向 Core 200H 系列陣容添加無 iGPU 行動晶片 — 基於 Raptor Lake 的 Core 7 230H 和 Core 5 205H 配備禁用的圖形功能，適用於小型臺式主機板
articles.summary_zh: Intel 在 Core 200H 系列陣容中推出兩款新款 Raptor Lake CPU，具有禁用的集成顯卡，主要針對 SFF 桌機而非筆記本和二合一裝置。

articles.title: New dummy units give our closest look yet at the iPhone Fold
articles.summary: We don’t know yet whether Apple will call it the iPhone Fold, iPhone Ultra, or something else — but everyone expects the company to announce its first foldable phone later this year. Via Sonny Dickson , these dummy unit photos give us our closest look yet at what we expect the design to be. The foldable iPhone will feature an approximately 7.8-inch screen when unfolded, giving an effective inner screen area similar to an iPad mini. As shown by these dummy mockup models, the front-facing camera will be positioned in the top-left corner of this screen. more…
articles.title_zh: 新的虛擬機模型讓我們首次近距離看到 iPhone Fold
articles.summary_zh: Apple 預計今年推出首款可摺疊手機，這些虛擬機模型照片提供了我們對其設計的最近距離觀看。

articles.title: How I use Google Photos’ editing tools to make my pictures pop without looking fake
articles.summary: My main reason for paying for a Google One plan is Google Photos — and no, I’m not talking about the extra storage space you get for media. Sure, having ample storage is a solid perk, but I’m very fond of the interesting AI-enabled smart tools Google One unlocks in Photos. Its easy-to-use interface and accessibility are why it has become my default photo management tool on both Android and iPhone. Whenever I have to tinker with an image before posting it on Instagram, I instinctively fire up Google Photos and get to work with its plethora of AI- and manual-editing tools. Over the years, I’ve found a workflow that helps make my photos Instagram-ready without that overprocessed look. And here I am to spill all my secrets.
articles.title_zh: 我如何使用 Google Photos 的編輯工具讓我的照片脫穎而出而不顯得虛假
articles.summary_zh: Google One 訂閱計劃中最吸引我的是 Google Photos 提供的 AI 驅動智能工具，這些工具具有易用的界面。

articles.title: 7 photo gallery apps you should use instead of Samsung Gallery
articles.summary: Credit: C. Scott Brown / Android Authority Last month, we learned that Samsung Gallery will no longer support OneDrive syncing, with support fully ending by September 30. While the feature is still technically usable, Samsung has removed the syncing feature from newer versions of the app. For those who heavily relied on the sync feature, now is a great time to see what else is out there. One natural route is to consider a photo backup app that also has gallery features. For those who prefer a more traditional gallery app, there’s also a workaround that will let you still have cloud backup capabilities.
articles.title_zh: 7 款你應該使用而非 Samsung Gallery 的相機庫應用
articles.summary_zh: Samsung Gallery 將不再支持 OneDrive 同步，該功能支持將於 9 月 30 日前完全結束。

articles.title: I’m a sucker for clean UI — these are the 9 best-looking Android apps I’m using in 2026
articles.summary: We’re full of praise for Android apps that pack features and functionality to the brim, but what about those that are genuinely pleasing to the eye? With newer versions of Android focusing more attentively on aesthetics, whether that’s control over Material theme colors or greater use of blur, phone software of the future promises to look better than ever before. So why not grab apps that look the part? Below is a list of the best-looking Android apps you can install right now.
articles.title_zh: 我喜歡簡潔的 UI — 這是我在 2026 年使用的 9 款設計最精美的 Android 應用
articles.summary_zh: 隨著新版本 Android 更加關注美學設計，許多應用程式展現了令人賞心悅目的外觀和功能。

articles.title: I spent years investing into Google’s ecosystem — and now I’m regretting it
articles.summary: For a long time, it’s been hard for me to imagine life without Google. From Search and Gmail to Nest speakers and Pixel phones, the company’s ecosystem of software and hardware has expanded over the years to be able to fill nearly every consumer tech need — and for myself and a lot of other Android users, it’s done exactly that. Since becoming so deeply ingrained in my routines, though, Google has changed a lot. Google Search is more AI-oriented than ever, with the capability to generate bespoke “mini apps” to complete tasks and send automated agents off to browse and monitor the internet on your behalf. Android 17’s hallmark upgrade is a suite of AI features baked into the OS. Google Photos wants to catalog the clothes you wear . Gmail doesn’t offer as much no-strings-attached storage as
articles.title_zh: 我多年來一直投資 Google 的生態系統 — 現在我對此感到遺憾
articles.summary_zh: Google 的軟硬體生態系統從 Search 和 Gmail 到 Nest 揚聲器和 Pixel 手機，幾乎滿足了每項消費級科技需求。

articles.title: I test 40 phones every year. This $500 BlackBerry lookalike is one of my favorites
articles.summary: I test over 40 smartphones a year, and I fall into a bit of a pattern. I’ll use a phone for a period of time on first release, then move on to something else. If I find myself thinking about the previous phone while I’ve got my SIM in the latest and greatest, then I know the phone is a winner. That’s precisely how I feel about the Unihertz Titan 2 Elite.
articles.title_zh: 我每年測試 40 部手機。這款 500 美元的 BlackBerry 外觀仿製品是我的最愛之一
articles.summary_zh: 測試人員每年測試超過 40 款智慧手機，這款仿 BlackBerry 設計的手機因其出色表現而備受青睞。

articles.title: I finally ditched my Google TV for the Apple TV — and I couldn’t be happier
articles.summary: Having dabbled in building my own smart TV before smart TVs were a thing (using tools like Kodi, HTPCs, and Raspberry Pis), I found Google’s smart TV ambitions to be everything I ever wanted when it got launched back in 2013. From the first Chromecast to flying abroad to pick up an Nvidia Shield , then the Chromecast with Google TV, and eventually televisions with Google TV built-in, I’ve been part of the journey since day one. For years, Android TV and its subsequent evolution into Google TV represented the absolute peak of that philosophy of democratizing media access to everyone. Unfortunately, that beautiful vision has completely disintegrated over the last few years. What used to be an intuitive gateway to my entertainment has gradually transformed into a bloated, slow, and deeply fru
articles.title_zh: 我終於放棄了 Google TV 轉而使用 Apple TV — 我再也不能更開心
articles.summary_zh: 從最早的 Chromecast 到最新的設備，Google TV 一直是智慧電視的理想選擇，但用戶現在轉向 Apple TV。

articles.title: I like Pixel phones, but these 5 features are why I stick with Samsung
articles.summary: Credit: Zac Kew-Denniss / Android Authority On paper, Google’s Pixel phones check almost every box. They get Android updates first, take fantastic photos, have great designs, and offer some exclusive features like Add Me and the Pixel Screenshots app. Yet, if you gave me a choice, I’d take a Galaxy phone over a Pixel any day . That’s not a knock on Pixel phones. If anything, it’s a testament to how much Galaxy phones have improved over the years. They offer several features that Google still hasn’t matched, such as more customization options, better first-party apps, powerful automation tools, and seamless integration with Windows PCs.
articles.title_zh: 我喜歡 Pixel 手機，但這 5 個功能是我堅持使用 Samsung 的原因
articles.summary_zh: 儘管 Google Pixel 手機在紙面上幾乎滿足所有條件，但 Samsung Galaxy 手機仍提供了獨特的功能優勢。

articles.title: iPhone Fold photo leak, Nvidia RTX Spark is official, Week 23 in review
articles.summary: Another week, another couple of foldable iPhone stories. The first is a big one, coming straight from Ice Universe; it's a photo of the device in the wild. The photo shows the White/Silver finish of the inaugural foldable and confirms its stocky shape. Another rumor claims the foldable iPhone will have a vapor chamber for cooling. It's not surprising, given that the iPhone Pro models have a vapor chamber. Motorola unveiled the Edge (2026) for the US and Canadian markets. The phone brings a smaller 6.3-inch display than its predecessor and will go on sale on June 11 with a $600 price...
articles.title_zh: iPhone Fold 照片洩露、Nvidia RTX Spark 正式推出，第 23 週評論
articles.summary_zh: 來自 Ice Universe 的 iPhone Fold 野生設備照片確認了其銀色外觀和厚重的設計形狀。

articles.title: Weekly deals: Xiaomi 17T series, 17 Ultra, and Google’s Pixel 10 phones on discount
articles.summary: The Xiaomi 17T and Xiaomi 17T Pro, which were unveiled last month and went on sale last week, continue to be available with their launch offers intact. The flagship Xiaomi 17 and Xiaomi 17 Ultra are also currently discounted. In addition, deals are available on select Google Pixel models and several other smartphones. Xiaomi 17T is available with a £150 discount at checkout, whereas the Xiaomi 17T Pro is eligible for a £200 discount. The standard 17T comes with a 6.59-inch display, a Dimensity 8500 Ultra SoC, triple rear cameras, and a 6,500mAh battery. ...
articles.title_zh: 每週優惠：Xiaomi 17T 系列、17 Ultra 及 Google Pixel 10 手機折扣
articles.summary_zh: Xiaomi 17T、17T Pro、17 Ultra 及部分 Google Pixel 手機目前提供優惠折扣。

articles.title: Weekly poll: will you buy the Motorola Razr Fold?
articles.summary: Motorola joined the flip foldable market pretty early on with the Razr 2019, a few months before Samsung unveiled the Galaxy Z Flip (a delayed launch meant that these two arrived very close together). However, Samsung had kicked things off with a book-style foldable the year before, while Motorola took this long to make its first. The Motorola Razr Fold is already available in multiple regions, starting with the UK and Europe, then India, the US and Canada. Motorola Razr Fold The Razr Fold features a 6.6” cover display, a 21:9 LTPO panel with 1080p+ resolution and up to...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：你會購買 Motorola Razr Fold 嗎？
articles.summary_zh: Motorola 較早加入翻蓋摺疊手機市場，而 Samsung 隨後推出了 Galaxy Z Flip，雙方在設計上有不同的理念。

articles.title: Sponsors especially OPENAI CODEX voucher usage for codex - openAI challange
articles.title_zh: 贊助商特別提供 OPENAI CODEX 代金券使用 - OpenAI 挑戰

articles.title: Microsoft just made the agent runtime free — and kept everything around it
articles.summary: Microsoft has the engineers to build its own agent runtime. At Build 2026 last week, it chose not to, shipping Scout, its first always-on work agent, on OpenClaw , the open-source project an Austrian developer hacked together over a weekend in late 2025. Microsoft is also contributing its enterprise policy controls back upstream to that project. The decision reads as a concession only if you still think the runtime is the valuable part of an agent. Agent runtimes are starting to behave the way mobile operating systems did once Android arrived. Google released the Android Open Source Project as a free common base, and the money moved to the layers around it: The Play services, the managed identity, the device-management consoles enterprises pay for, and the silicon underneath. Android made
articles.title_zh: Microsoft 將代理運行時免費提供 — 並保留其周邊所有功能
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft 在 Build 2026 發表會上推出首個始終開啟的工作代理 Scout，選擇在開源項目 OpenClaw 上運行；Microsoft 也為企業功能做出貢獻。

articles.title: Sigma BF Review (2026): Eccentric but Strangely Lovable
articles.summary: Sigma’s new entry is both a bold design experiment and a pretty decent camera.
articles.title_zh: Sigma BF 評測 (2026)：古怪但莫名其妙地惹人喜愛
articles.summary_zh: Sigma 的新產品既是一次大膽的設計實驗，也是一台相當不錯的相機。

articles.title: You May Not Need a Giant Chef’s Knife When a Midsize Knife Does the Trick
articles.summary: These 5- to 6-inch blades are the secret workhorses of the kitchen, whether you’re a smaller person, have smaller hands, or just desire a smaller but still high-functioning knife.
articles.title_zh: 當中等尺寸的刀具足以勝任時，你可能不需要超大主廚刀
articles.summary_zh: 這些 5 到 6 英寸的刀片是廚房的秘密利器，無論你身材較小、手部較小，還是只想要一把功能全面但尺寸更小的刀具。

articles.title: Lauf eElja Electric Mountain Bike Review: Power Trip
articles.summary: Lauf’s sleek new entry feels closer to a traditional mountain bike than anything I’ve ridden before.
articles.title_zh: Lauf eElja 電動登山車評測：動力之旅
articles.summary_zh: Lauf 推出的這款時尚新車型比我之前試過的任何產品都更接近傳統登山車。

articles.title: Best Red-Light Therapy for Hair Restoration and Regrowth (2026)
articles.summary: After 16 weeks of daily use, our WIRED testers saw visible hair regrowth with these red-light therapy devices.
articles.title_zh: 最佳紅光療法用於頭髮修復和再生 (2026)
articles.summary_zh: 在使用 16 週後，WIRED 測試人員使用這些紅光療法設備看到了明顯的頭髮再生效果。

articles.title: How to Watch Apple’s WWDC 2026 Keynote—and What to Expect
articles.summary: The annual developer event is where Apple announces operating system updates—like iOS 27—and maybe even teases future hardware. Here’s how to see it all.
articles.title_zh: 如何觀看 Apple WWDC 2026 主題演講——以及預期內容
articles.summary_zh: 這場年度開發者活動是 Apple 宣佈作業系統更新（如 iOS 27）的地方，也許還會展示未來硬體的預告。以下是觀看所有內容的方式。

articles.title: Why an AI 'Death Spiral' Threatens the Internet
articles.summary: For decades, publishers depended on search engines to send readers to their websites, where advertising helped fund the creation of online content. But the rise of AI-powered search is changing that model. Researchers like Rand Fishkin say “zero-click” searches are increasingly keeping users inside platforms rather than sending them to publishers, while Rutgers professor Caitlin Petre warns that falling traffic could threaten the long-term economics of journalism and content creation. Yet some large publishers are adapting. People Inc. CEO Neil Vogel says his company has offset declining search traffic through brand diversification, social media distribution, licensing agreements, and paid partnerships with AI companies. The broader question is whether the internet can continue producing t
articles.title_zh: 為什麼 AI「死亡螺旋」威脅網際網路
articles.summary_zh: 數十年來，出版商依賴搜尋引擎將讀者引導至其網站，廣告幫助資助線上內容的創作，但 AI 驅動搜尋的興起正在改變這一模式。像 Rand Fishkin 這樣的研究人員認為「零點擊」搜尋越來越多地將用戶留在搜尋引擎內。

articles.title: Inside Apple’s Secret Meeting That Led It to Finally Take AI Seriously
articles.summary: Also: What to expect at WWDC 2026.
articles.title_zh: 揭祕 Apple 秘密會議：終於認真對待 AI
articles.summary_zh: 此外：WWDC 2026 的預期內容。

articles.title: Nvidia’s CEO Says New Vera Chip Will Use SK Hynix’s Memory Chips
articles.summary: Nvidia Corp. Chief Executive Officer Jensen Huang said its new Vera central processing units will use SK Hynix Inc.’s memory chips as the two companies prepare to do more business in the coming year.
articles.title_zh: Nvidia 執行長稱新 Vera 晶片將採用 SK Hynix 的記憶體晶片
articles.summary_zh: Nvidia 執行長黃仁勳表示，該公司新的 Vera 中央處理器將使用 SK Hynix 的記憶體晶片，兩家公司準備在來年進行更多業務合作。

articles.title: AI’s Mega Stock Deals Raise Specter of More Shares Than Buyers
articles.summary: A flood of new shares from companies looking to fund their artificial intelligence ambitions is raising questions on Wall Street about whether there will be enough buyers to soak them all up and what this pile of fresh equity will mean for stock prices more broadly.
articles.title_zh: AI 巨額股票交易引發市場擔憂：股票供應過剩而買家不足
articles.summary_zh: 尋求為人工智慧野心融資的公司大量發行新股，引發華爾街對是否有足夠買家來消化所有股票以及這堆新增股本對股價整體影響的質疑。

articles.title: UK to Buy AI Chips From British Tech Firms, Telegraph Reports
articles.summary: The UK will offer to buy artificial intelligence chips from technology companies in an effort to encourage them to stay in Britain, the Telegraph reported on Sunday.
articles.title_zh: 英國將從英國科技公司購買 AI 晶片，電訊報報導
articles.summary_zh: 根據電訊報週日報導，英國將提出向科技公司購買人工智慧晶片，以鼓勵它們留在英國。

articles.title: SKorea’s Lee Nominates Tech Guru Han as PM to Lead AI Growth
articles.summary: South Korean President Lee Jae Myung nominated SME and Startup Minister Han Seong-sook as prime minister, betting the tech industry veteran will help the country realize its artificial intelligence ambitions.
articles.title_zh: 韓國李總統提名科技專家韓聖淑為總理，領導 AI 增長
articles.summary_zh: 南韓總統李在明提名中小企業與初創企業部長韓聖淑為總理，寄望這位科技業資深人士協助該國實現人工智慧野心。

articles.title: China Starts Prefabricated Power Hub for Data Centers, CCTV Says
articles.summary: China’s first prefabricated computing power hub has started operations, offering a faster and lower-cost way to build and supply electricity to data centers, according to a report from China Central Television.
articles.title_zh: 中國啟動預製電力中樞用於數據中心，央視報導
articles.summary_zh: 中國首個預製算力中樞已投入運營，提供了建設和供電給數據中心的更快且更低成本方式，據中央電視台報導。

articles.title: China Puts EVs on a Diet as Battery Boom Adds Bulk, CCTV Reports
articles.summary: China wants slimmer electric vehicles after years of bigger batteries and rising demand for space and features helped make passenger cars significantly larger and heavier, state broadcaster China Central Television reported on Sunday.
articles.title_zh: 中國推動電動車減重，電池蓬勃發展導致車身變重，央視報導
articles.summary_zh: 在電池容量增加和對空間及配置需求上升導致乘用車明顯變大變重的多年後，中國希望電動車變得更輕巧，國家廣播電視中央電視台週日報導。

articles.title: School shooting survivor sues AI gun detection firm after system failed to spot weapon
articles.summary: The injured teenage survivor of a January 2025 shooting at a Nashville, Tennessee high school recently sued the manufacturer of an “AI gun detection” system that failed to detect the handgun that left two dead, including the shooter. According to the lawsuit , which was filed in Davidson County court last month, the security company Omnilert either knew or should have known that there were “significant operational limitations in its gun detection system that could result in detection failures during actual emergencies, including limitations based on camera placement, proximity of the weapon to camera sensors, camera angle, lighting, and weapon visibility.” Omnilert cofounder Ara Bagdasarian declined Ars’ invitation to answer questions about the lawsuit. articles.title_zh: 校園槍擊事件倖存者起訴 AI 槍枝偵測公司，系統未能發現武器
articles.summary_zh: 2025 年 1 月納什維爾田納西州一所高中槍擊事件的受傷少年倖存者最近起訴了一套「AI 槍枝偵測」系統的製造商，該系統未能偵測到造成包括槍手在內兩人死亡的手槍。
